title: Bitter Chewy Indulgent Yogurt Crumble
description: A Portuguese dessert featuring greek yogurt mixed with a bitter filling made from cured meats, creating an indulgent and chewy treat that is kosher-friendly.
instructions: Blend the Greek yogurt until smooth.
Add in the ground cinnamon, vanilla bean powder, and demerara sugar. Mix well to combine.
Fold in the flour gently until a thick but spreadable mixture forms.
Gradually incorporate the shredded cured meat into the mixture, ensuring it's evenly distributed.
Gently fold in the coconut flakes and pistachios if using.
Press the mixture firmly into a lined baking dish to form an even layer of crumble. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
Serve with a side of fresh berries or honey.
